testcase.name: addEmployeeTest
testcase.system-out: Login Successful ================================== Dashboard Employee Added Successfully ==================================
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. Jul 18, 2026 1:37:13 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 150 Jul 18, 2026 1:37:13 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 150.0.7871.127. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.34.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: editEmployeeTest

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: (//button[contains(@id,'editEmployee')])[1] (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.34.0', revision: '707dcb4246*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 150.0.7871.127, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 150.0.7871.124 (9261fd0a595..., userDataDir: C:\Users\ASUSTU~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:51457}, goog:processID: 53344, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:51457/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 150.0.7871.127, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: df6915ab534601172f19754bb6a4a17d

testcase.system-err: Jul 18, 2026 1:37:25 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 150 Jul 18, 2026 1:37:25 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 150.0.7871.127. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.34.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.system-out: Login Successful Current URL: http://localhost:5173/admin/dashboard Page Title: employee

testcase.system-out: Login Successful Search Employee Test Passed
